body.purpose: Default readable text. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Form labels, table headers, metadata captions.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog headers, sidebar section labels.

shadows.name: highlight
shadows.purpose: Transient attention pulse on highlighted cards. Fades after 3s.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button. Used for login, connect, execute actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #11518E; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0d4070; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8EBFFB; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Toolbar items, cancel actions, low-emphasis controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #0f0f0f; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8EBFFB; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Storage unit cards, database type selectors. Click to expand or navigate.
components.html: users12 columns
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.625rem; padding: 1rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #11518E; } .ds-card-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 0.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f5f5f5; border: 1px solid #11518E; color: #11518E; } .ds-card-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #0f0f0f; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #6b7280; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text inputs for connection forms, query parameters, search fields.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0f0f0f; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #11518E; outline: 2px solid #8EBFFB; outline-offset: 0; } .ds-input:hover:not(:focus) { border-color: #9ca3af; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation items. Active shows brand color; inactive is muted.
components.html: Tables
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b7280; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out, color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f5f5f5; color: #0f0f0f; } .ds-nav-active { background: #f0f7ff; color: #11518E; } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: #e3f0ff; }

components.name: Keyboard Shortcut Badge
components.description: Keyboard shortcut indicators shown next to actions.
components.css: .ds-kbd-group { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; } .ds-kbd { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; background: #f5f5f5; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 0.25rem; color: #6b7280; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 #e5e7eb; }

narrative.overview:
Terminal efficiency meets modern interface. WhoDB's visual system channels the clarity of a well-configured terminal — functional density, monochrome confidence, and zero decorative noise — while maintaining the approachability of a modern product UI. Every pixel serves comprehension or interaction; nothing exists for ornament.

The system rejects the cluttered chaos of legacy database tools (phpMyAdmin, pgAdmin) and the bloated menu hierarchies of enterprise software (Oracle, IBM tooling). It equally rejects playful SaaS illustration-fests that undermine credibility with infrastructure professionals.

Information is the interface. The design removes itself so data can speak. Controls are discoverable but unobtrusive. State changes are immediate. The system assumes expertise and rewards it.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome-dominant with a single blue accent used sparingly
Flat surfaces differentiated by tonal layering, not shadows
Inter variable font at multiple weights for clear hierarchy without font pairing
Dark and light modes as equal citizens

rules.name: The 10% Rule
rules.body: The primary blue is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity gives it authority. When everything is blue, nothing is.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only shadows in the system are transient state indicators (highlight pulse) or floating-layer signals (popovers, modals). No ambient shadows on cards, no resting-state elevation.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Size Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy within a section is conveyed through weight changes (400 → 500 → 600) before reaching for size changes. Size jumps are reserved for structural boundaries (page title vs card content), not inline emphasis.

dos: Do use Inter at multiple weights (400, 500, 600) to create hierarchy without introducing additional typefaces.
Do differentiate surfaces with tonal steps (surface → muted → code) rather than shadows.
Do keep the brand blue to ≤10% of any screen. Active nav items, primary CTAs, brand marks only.
Do provide full keyboard navigation for all interactive elements.
Do respect the configurable density system (compact/comfortable/spacious) — spacing variables, not hardcoded values.
Do test both light and dark mode as equal citizens. Neither is derived from the other.
donts: Don't add ambient shadows to resting cards or surfaces. Flat-by-default is the system.
Don't use gradient fills on buttons, backgrounds, or text. Solid, single-tone fills only.
Don't add illustrations, mascots, or decorative graphics. The data IS the content.
Don't introduce additional typefaces. Inter handles the entire hierarchy.
Don't create cluttered toolbars with dozens of visible buttons (phpMyAdmin pattern).
Don't gate features behind wizard flows or multi-step modals (enterprise bloat pattern).
Don't use playful rounded corners (≥1rem on small elements), pastel accent colors, or illustration-heavy empty states.
Don't add loading skeletons or spinners where instant rendering is achievable.
